text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Why does it feel like someone was calling me
just now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I wonder if whoever called me is hungry...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Helloooo? I can make you some chanko, so come
out, come out, wherever you are!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's the Three Goddesses. Hehe. Would you
like to join me for some chan—
